title: Rebuild complete dabbawala delivery app with all features

requirements.text: Rebuild the complete backend with all data models including Meal, Order, RestaurantProfile, DeliveryPartner, CustomerProfile, and DabbaBooking with their respective status enums and OTP authentication system supporting both Twilio SMS and email verification
acceptanceCriteria: All data types from backend/main.mo are recreated including Meal, Order, RestaurantProfile, DeliveryPartner, CustomerProfile, DabbaBooking
OTP authentication system supports both email and phone (Twilio) verification
Access control and state management functions are implemented
All CRUD operations for meals, orders, bookings, profiles are functional

requirements.text: Rebuild the multi-tenant PWA architecture with four standalone apps (Customer, Delivery, Restaurant, Admin) that can be detected and launched based on URL parameters, subdomains, or paths
acceptanceCriteria: App.tsx correctly detects and routes to customer, delivery, restaurant, or admin apps
Each app has its own standalone entry point component
URL parameter detection and session storage management works correctly
App directory page displays all four apps with launch buttons

requirements.text: Rebuild authentication system supporting Internet Identity and OTP login (email and phone) for all four app types with profile setup flows
acceptanceCriteria: Login prompts support Internet Identity, email OTP, and phone OTP for each app type
Phone OTP validates Indian phone numbers
Profile setup flows collect appropriate information for each user type
Session persistence works across page refreshes
OTP resend functionality with expiry handling

requirements.text: Rebuild customer app features including meal browsing, subscription ordering, dabba booking flow with pickup/drop addresses and time slots, order history, and booking management
acceptanceCriteria: Customer can browse meals and place subscription orders
Multi-step dabba booking flow collects addresses, time slots, and frequency
Order history displays with status badges and review submission
Booking view shows active bookings with cancel functionality
Home page displays booking and order summaries with lazy loading

requirements.text: Rebuild restaurant partner app with meal management (create, edit, image upload), order viewing, and revenue tracking dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant can create and edit meals with image uploads
Order list displays incoming orders with details
Revenue tracking shows earnings from orders
Meal images are prefetched for performance

requirements.text: Rebuild delivery partner app with availability toggle, assigned orders and bookings dashboard, status update controls, and earnings tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Delivery partner can toggle availability status
Dashboard shows assigned meal orders and dabba bookings
Status updates can be applied to deliveries
Earnings are tracked and displayed
Separate tabs for meal orders and dabba bookings

requirements.text: Rebuild admin app with statistics dashboard, management interfaces for customers, restaurants, delivery partners, and orders with CSV export functionality, plus Twilio configuration panel
acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard displays key statistics
Management tables show customers, restaurants, delivery partners, and orders
CSV export functionality works for all data types
Twilio configuration panel allows setting up SMS credentials
All data tables are searchable and sortable

requirements.text: Rebuild PWA functionality with app-specific manifests for each tenant, service worker with aggressive caching strategies, install prompts, and offline support
acceptanceCriteria: Each app type has its own PWA manifest with appropriate theme colors
Service worker implements versioned cache management for static, runtime, images, API, and fonts
Install prompts appear for first-time users
Apps work offline with cached data
Performance monitoring tracks Core Web Vitals

requirements.text: Rebuild theming system with OKLCH color schemes for each app variant (customer green, delivery blue, restaurant orange, admin slate) with light/dark mode support using Tailwind CSS
acceptanceCriteria: Each app type uses its designated color scheme
CSS custom properties define theme colors with OKLCH
Light and dark modes are supported
Shadcn UI components integrate with theme system
Theme colors persist across navigation

requirements.text: Rebuild React Query integration with hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, meals, orders, reviews, bookings, subscriptions, delivery partners, and restaurant profiles with localStorage fallback
acceptanceCriteria: All backend queries and mutations use React Query hooks
Data invalidation works correctly after mutations
localStorage provides fallback for offline scenarios
Loading and error states are properly handled
Actor instance management integrates with Internet Identity state

constraints: Maintain the single-actor Motoko backend architecture
Preserve the multi-tenant PWA structure with four standalone apps
Keep the existing authentication flow supporting Internet Identity and OTP
Maintain the OKLCH color system and app-specific theming
Do not modify the read-only UI component paths listed in immutablePaths
nonGoals: Adding new features beyond what exists in the current codebase
Changing the technology stack or frameworks
Modifying the deployment or hosting infrastructure
Integrating third-party services beyond Twilio for SMS
